symptom: Motor tripped on overload after 3 hours of continuous run
fix_applied: Replaced thermal overload relay and re-torqued motor mounts

symptom: Intermittent pressure drop below 6 bar and audible knock
fix_applied: Cleaned intake filter and replaced worn pressure regulator

symptom: Seal leak with fluid pooling under housing
fix_applied: Replaced mechanical seal assembly and shaft sleeve

symptom: Belt slipping under load with temperature spike on drive motor
fix_applied: Re-tensioned belt and cleaned drum of debris

symptom: Oil temperature alarm triggered at 95C during peak load
fix_applied: Flushed oil circuit and replaced cooler fan assembly

symptom: Vibration levels exceeding 7 mm/s RMS on bearing housing
fix_applied: Rebalanced impeller and replaced worn bearing set

symptom: Gearbox oil leak from output seal causing slow drive response
fix_applied: Replaced output shaft seal and refilled gearbox with ISO VG 220 oil

symptom: Unloader valve stuck closed causing repeated safety trips
fix_applied: Replaced unloader valve solenoid and tested cutoff pressures

symptom: Cavitation noise with discharge pressure fluctuating
fix_applied: Cleared suction line blockage and replaced foot valve

symptom: Photo eye sensor intermittently failing to detect products
fix_applied: Cleaned sensor lens and realigned emitter-receiver pair

symptom: Pressure switch chattering with rapid cycling on and off
fix_applied: Replaced pressure switch and verified differential setpoint

symptom: Motor drawing 12A vs nameplate 9A under no-load
fix_applied: Cleaned rotor windings and replaced starter contactor

symptom: Drive motor winding failure with burnt smell
fix_applied: Swapped drive motor to spare unit and scheduled rewind on original

symptom: Cooler fan running but oil still reaching 88C at 75% duty
fix_applied: Cleared debris from cooler fins and verified fan RPM with strobe

symptom: Major seal failure with product contamination
fix_applied: Full seal replacement and cleaned casing contamination

symptom: End-of-line inductive sensor dropping targets during fast runs
fix_applied: Adjusted sensor sensitivity and replaced mounting bracket

symptom: Air receiver tank drain auto-valve failed closed causing water carryover
fix_applied: Replaced auto-drain valve and installed upstream water separator

symptom: Slight coupling misalignment detected during 6-month inspection
fix_applied: Laser-aligned coupling and re-torqued coupling bolts to 45 Nm

symptom: Hydraulic pressure on tensioner dropping overnight
fix_applied: Replaced tensioner cylinder seal kit and bled air from circuit

symptom: Safety relief weeping at 8.1 bar instead of set 8.5 bar
fix_applied: Replaced safety relief valve and verified set pressure on calibrated bench

symptom: Drive motor bearing noise with 5 degree rise above ambient on housing
fix_applied: Replaced drive-side bearing and flushed grease circuit

symptom: Slow seal weep at flush port detected during weekly inspection
fix_applied: Replaced seal flush fittings and re-torqued gland bolts

symptom: Oil temperature reached 102C triggering emergency shutdown
fix_applied: Replaced oil cooler core and topped up to ISO VG 46

symptom: Belt speed sensor reporting 8% slip under full product load
fix_applied: Replaced speed pickup and recalibrated drum encoder

symptom: Impeller rub on casing wear ring after hydraulic shock event
fix_applied: Replaced wear ring and balanced impeller assembly

symptom: Gearbox breather clogged causing slight pressure build
fix_applied: Replaced breather cap and topped up gearbox oil

symptom: Unloader valve slow to cycle on startup in cold environment
fix_applied: Replaced unloader solenoid coil and added heat trace

symptom: Discharge pressure oscillation at 2 Hz after suction strainer service
fix_applied: Re-primed pump and verified NPSH margin above 1.5 m

symptom: Position sensor miss during fastest index cycle only
fix_applied: Replaced sensor with higher switching frequency model

symptom: Auto drain valve stuck open wasting 12% of compressed air
fix_applied: Replaced drain valve timer and actuator seals
